reviews.review_description: Amazing game btw Simon was just mad he got demoted try it out some time (up Nov 28 24)
this game give me old capuchin vibes with capuchin v2 stuff. W mrchimpo!

I have been playing jungle jive since the first version of the game it is really good. There are multiple maps and gamemodes like for example, in gamemodes is lethal mode, which is really fun. I am a manager for the game, but there is no bias

This game has some toxic, homophobic, and racist mods. If you don’t want to have a game with those types of mods, don’t download this game. This game has also had drama numerous times, and the owner doesn’t take anything serious.

developer_response.body: These are all cap, i swear on everything it is, the drama was caused by him and anyways he got demoted and he wrote this review cause he was mad, we do not have toxic homophobic and racist mods, i took the hacking incident serious.

reviews.review_title: Very underrated and the best game
reviews.review_description: This game is a very good game and you should try it and it even has TAG.Very good this game should get popular !!!
The maps are big there is a great community and really fun game and a really scary horror mode you should really check it out once you play it you will get addicted
It is a very fun game my cousin jace told me about you should definitely get it
